curl:
curl -X POST "https://dev.api.upmount.sotatek.works/api/users/auth/login" \
  -H "Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMTE4IiwiZW1haWwiOiJ0aWVuLm5ndXllbjJAc290YXRlay5jb20iLCJyb2xlIjoidXNlciIsIm9yZ2FuaXphdGlvbklkIjpudWxsLCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25Pd25lciI6ZmFsc2UsImtleVRva2VuIjoiODc0Mzg3NDYtMGVmMS00M2U2LWFiZmMtMGEzYTE3ZGFlMmQ4IiwidHlwIjoiQUNDRVNTIiwiaWF0IjoxNzcyNjkzODkxLCJleHAiOjE3NzI3ODAyOTF9.h-6FEsDpxw5BNIErxUiS8jkDKfKAky2cxChfZognQnE" \
  -d '"email=test@test.com&password=test"'
testName: Content-Type manipulation вҶ’ no 5xx
Extremely long email (10000 chars) вҶ’ no 5xx
Extremely long password (10000 chars) вҶ’ no 5xx
Null bytes in email вҶ’ no 5xx
Unicode overflow in body вҶ’ no 5xx
Empty body on POST endpoint вҶ’ no 5xx
Array instead of object body вҶ’ no 5xx
Nested object depth attack вҶ’ no 5xx
Path traversal: ../../../etc/passwd... вҶ’ no 5xx
Path traversal: ..%2F..%2F..%2Fetc%2Fpass... вҶ’ no 5xx
Path traversal: ....//....//....//etc/pas... вҶ’ no 5xx
Path traversal: %2e%2e%2f%2e%2e%2f%2e%2e%... вҶ’ no 5xx
